case_title: ADAM JOSEF VS. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF JOSEF, ADAM

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF ADAM JOSEF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY TRICIA PEARSE WILLIAMS (CLAIM ADJUSTER). DEFENDANT CCSF INFORMS COURT THAT THEY ARE READY TO SETTLE OUTSIDE COURT. CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST BY PARTIES AS SETTLEMENT REACHED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
